title: Yakun Zhou
text:
Master of Geomatics for Environmental Management Candidate
Welcome to my E-Portfolio. This site showcases selected academic and technical work completed during the Master of Geomatics for Environmental Management program at the University of British Columbia. My interests focus on GIS, spatial analysis, environmental risk assessment, and geospatial decision support.


I am a geomatics and environmental management student with experience in ArcGIS Pro, remote sensing, spatial analysis, and map-based communication. Through the MGEM program, I have worked on projects involving wildfire risk mapping, environmental analysis, and geospatial data interpretation.



This portfolio includes selected projects that demonstrate my development in:

GIS-based spatial analysis
Wildfire risk modelling
Environmental planning support
Data visualization and communication

title: Resume
text: I am a Master of Geomatics for Environmental Management student at the University of British Columbia with a background in Geography and Environmental Management from the University of Waterloo. My experience spans GIS, spatial analysis, environmental planning, data visualization, and geospatial decision support. Across academic, co-op, and professional projects, I have worked with ArcGIS Pro, QGIS, Python, R, SQL, Tableau, and Power BI to support environmental analysis and infrastructure planning.

title: Publications
text:
Authors: Yan Wen, Hui-Zheng Sun, Liang Liu, Ya-Kun Zhou, Wei Bian, Ming-Hai Yan
Journal: Journal of Network Intelligence
Volume and Issue: 10(1)
Pages: 366–382
Date: February 2025
Read the paper
This publication focuses on session-based recommendation systems and proposes a graph neural network framework that combines normal graph and hypergraph structures. The model is designed to better represent short-term user behavior and group intention within anonymous sessions, while also incorporating cross-session information to improve recommendation accuracy.

title: Resume
text:
Technical Skills

GIS and Mapping: ArcGIS Pro, QGIS, digital mapping, geocoding, network analysis
Programming and Data Analysis: Python, R, SQL Server, PostgreSQL/PostGIS, SPSS
Visualization: Tableau, Power BI, Excel
Remote Sensing: ENVI, LiDAR/RADAR Analysis, Google Earth Engine, Drone Operation
Applied Areas: Environmental Impact Assessment, Spatial Analysis, Risk Mapping, Project Support

title: Resume
text:
Selected Experience

GIS & Geospatial Intelligence Analyst
AECO Innovation Lab
Richmond Hill, Canada
January 2024 – April 2024

Analyzed land use changes in Clarington area across past decade, identifying trends through spatial data analysis to inform future regional planning
Developed GIS-based transportation network model for Kawartha Lakes region to enhance traffic flow predictions, road construction planning and overall transportation efficiency
Optimized Environmental Impact Assessment (EIA) for Niagara Falls area by conducting spatial analysis to identify potential environmental risks and proposing effective mitigation measures
Collected and processed geospatial data from multiple sources using ArcGIS including data cleaning, integration and analysis; produced infrastructure atlases for Grimsby and St. Catharines to support urban planning and infrastructure project implementation
Conducted geospatial analysis of land use, transportation networks and environmental impacts to provide actionable insights for regional development and infrastructure planning; visualized spatial data by creating maps, charts and other materials to facilitate informed decision-making
Prepared technical documents and project reports to outline analysis processes and results, ensuring transparency and sustainability in project execution



Water & Wastewater Infrastructure Planner
Region of Peel
Brampton, Canada
September 2022 – December 2022

Created 4 types of maps using ArcMap, showcasing versatility in map-making and ability to enhance project analysis
Used ArcGIS to refine sewer and downspout data for City of Brampton by applying filters and tools to ensure data accuracy and relevance
Updated and managed smoke test data for Region of Peel using Excel, effectively maintaining up-to-date result records
Summarized construction report data and maps in MS Word for documentation review to drive clear and efficient project communication
Supported wastewater management efforts in Region of Peel by producing 40 maps for 10 sites in 4 months



Data Analyst
Accenture
Shanghai, China (Remote)
May 2023 – August 2023

Designed and implemented automated data processing and report generation systems, reducing
Collected, cleaned and preprocessed data from multiple sources using Python and SQL to maintain accuracy and consistency for reliable analysis
Employed Excel and Tableau to perform data analysis and create visualizations to present results and support team decision-making



Technical Documentation Engineer
Oneflow Technology Limited
Beijing, China Jan 2022 - Apr 2022


Acquired coding-related translation and testing skills including submitting API translation documents and assisting in refinement of 2 databases
Managed translation tasks and supported publicity department with video clips and article translations
Aided social media growth initiative, successfully increasing company’s followers by 2,000 in 2 months via effective content translation and engagement



Research Assistant
Fibos Inc.
Toronto, Canada
July 2024 – August 2024

Researched combustion monitoring technologies and their environmental applications
Used Power BI to analyze and visualize system performance data
Contributed literature reviews, reporting, and sustainability-related analysis
